title: CATL declines nearly 7% as the Chinese battery maker unveils $5 billion share placement
summary_full: Shares of Contemporary Amperex Technology (CATL) declined nearly 7% after the EV battery giant unveiled plans for a roughly $5 billion equity placement in Hong Kong.
summary_public: Shares of Contemporary Amperex Technology (CATL) declined nearly 7% after the EV battery giant unveiled plans for a roughly $5 billion equity placement in Hong Kong.
